plugins.description: One-knob vocal compressor designed for quick, effective vocal level control.

plugins.name: Scheps Omni Channel
plugins.description: Channel strip designed by Andrew Scheps with compression, EQ, saturation, and de-essing.

plugins.name: SSL E-Channel
plugins.description: Channel strip modeled after the SSL 4000 E-Series console with EQ, dynamics, and filters.

plugins.name: SSL G-Master Buss Compressor
plugins.description: Bus compressor modeled after the SSL 4000 G-Series master bus compressor.

plugins.name: Vitamin
plugins.description: Multiband harmonic enhancer that adds energy and presence to individual frequency ranges.

plugins.name: WaveShell
plugins.description: Waves plugin hosting shell that loads individual Waves plugins inside a DAW.

plugins.name: Spectre
plugins.description: Multiband harmonic enhancer that adds saturation and harmonics per frequency band.

plugins.name: Trackspacer
plugins.description: Dynamic sidechain EQ that creates space for one track by ducking conflicting frequencies in another.

plugins.name: Cthulhu
plugins.description: Chord and arpeggio MIDI effect that generates chords from single notes with pattern sequencing.

plugins.name: LFOTool
plugins.description: LFO-driven volume, filter, and pan modulation tool for sidechain-style effects and tremolo.

plugins.name: OTT
plugins.description: Multiband upward/downward compressor recreating the popular Ableton preset for aggressive dynamics.

plugins.name: Serum
plugins.description: Advanced wavetable synthesizer with visual feedback, drag-and-drop modulation, and built-in effects.

plugins.name: Serum 2
plugins.description: Next-generation wavetable synthesizer building on Serum with expanded synthesis and modulation.

plugins.name: Addictive Drums 2
plugins.description: Drum production plugin with mix-ready kits, pattern browser, and tone shaping controls.

plugins.name: RC-20 Retro Color
plugins.description: Lo-fi and retro effects processor with noise, wobble, distortion, and space modules.

plugins.name: Youlean Loudness Meter 2
plugins.description: Loudness metering plugin supporting LUFS, true peak, and various broadcast standards.

plugins.name: PITCHMAP COLORS
plugins.description: Real-time polyphonic pitch remapping plugin for retuning or transposing audio material.
